title: Bug tracking templates: Improved views and new project setup
description:
Jira Cloud offers an improved bug tracking experience with updates to the company-managed project bug tracking template and a new team-managed project bug tracking template. These changes provide clearer, more useful default views, making it easier to set up and manage bug tracking projects. To get started with this change: Select Create project in Jira Cloud.
	Choose the Software development category.
	Find and select the Bug tracking template.
	Select Use template to create your project.
